title: narrative_theory_schema
description: A single plot theory layout containing story milestones

theory_name.description: Human readable name of the theory, e.g., Save the Cat

description.description: Summary explaining the core concept of this plot structure

milestones.description: List of sequential story milestones / act nodes

milestone_id.description: Unique ID for this node, e.g., STC_01_SETUP

act.description: The broad act categorization, typically '기', '승', '전', '결' or 'Act 1'

description.description: Instructions or events that occur in this structural beat

mapped_functions.description: List of function tags or archetype codes mapped here, e.g., ['STC_DEBATE']
